_note: Model B (churn) is the headline: real Inactive label, strong call-behavior signal (~0.96 CV ROC). Recency/eligibility-date columns were dropped as circular leakage. Model A (responsiveness) is a softer PROXY (~0.86 CV ROC): target_willing is 'ever donated', so donation-count and donor_type were dropped to avoid tautology. Report A with its caveat; never headline it.
